title: Charles F. Berman Field
body: Charles F. Berman Field is a soccer-specific stadium located on the campus of Cornell University in Ithaca, New York. The stadium serves as home venue to the Cornell Big Red men's and women's soccer teams.
categories: Athletics (track and field) venues in New York (state)
